product_overview: Backend API to support a restaurant Point-of-Sale (POS) and kitchen workflow: create and manage DINE_IN/DELIVERY/PICKUP orders, admin kitchen display (KDS) status flow, product management (physical/digital/restaurant), secure JWT authentication, and digital product downloads.
core_goals: Enable reliable POS waiter flows including guest checkout and server-side price/stock validation.
Provide admin kitchen display endpoints to manage order lifecycle (PENDING -> PREPARING -> READY -> SERVED/DELIVERED).
Support product CRUD for PHYSICAL, DIGITAL and RESTAURANT types with variants and modifier groups.
Secure user authentication with JWT, token refresh, and account lifecycle endpoints.
Deliver secure digital product downloads tied to orders and protect unauthorized access.
Increase automated test coverage for POS-specific controllers and OrdersService behaviors and address known limitations (modifier validation, order number collisions, rate limiting).

features.name: Orders Management (POS / Restaurant)
features.description: Create, list, and manage restaurant orders from the waiter POS, supporting DINE_IN, DELIVERY and PICKUP. Server-side enforces price calculation, stock validation, modifier constraints, and exposes download endpoints for digital products.
user_flows: POST /orders with body { orderType: 'DINE_IN', tableNumber: '5', items: [{ variantId: 'v123', quantity: 2 }] } without Authorization -> Receive 201 with created Order containing items and modifiers

POST /auth/login with valid waiter credentials -> Receive 200 with accessToken and refreshToken -> POST /orders with Authorization Bearer token and order dto -> Receive 201 with created Order -> GET /orders/my-orders with same token -> Receive 200 with Order[] including items and variant.product
POST /orders with body containing unknown variantId 'invalid' -> Receive 404 Variant not found
POST /orders with body selecting modifiers that violate min/max selection constraints -> Receive 400 Validation error (modifier limits)
POST /orders with body where one item exceeds available stock -> Receive 400 Validation error (stock)

features.name: Admin Orders Management (Kitchen Display)
features.description: Admin endpoints for listing all orders (optionally filtered by status) and updating order status through the kitchen workflow (PENDING -> PREPARING -> READY -> SERVED/DELIVERED).
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid admin credentials -> Receive 200 with accessToken -> GET /admin/orders with Authorization Bearer token -> Receive 200 with Order[] including user, items and modifiers
GET /admin/orders?status=PENDING with valid admin token -> Receive 200 with filtered Order[]
PATCH /admin/orders/:id/status with Authorization Bearer token and body { status: 'PREPARING' } -> Receive 200 with updated Order including items and modifiers
PATCH /admin/orders/:id/status with Authorization Bearer token for non-existent id -> Receive 404 Order not found
GET /admin/orders without Authorization -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Products Management
features.description: CRUD operations for products including variants, modifier groups and modifiers. Supports PHYSICAL, DIGITAL and RESTAURANT product types with stock, SKU, images and published state.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid admin credentials -> Receive 200 with accessToken -> POST /products with Authorization Bearer token and body { name, slug, productType, basePrice, modifierGroups: [...] } -> Receive 201 with created Product including variants and modifierGroups
POST /products with Authorization and body using an existing slug -> Receive 400 Slug already exists
POST /products without Authorization -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Authentication
features.description: JWT-based authentication including register, login and token refresh to secure user and admin actions.
user_flows: POST /auth/register with body { email, password, name } -> Receive 201 with created User
POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with { accessToken, refreshToken, user }
POST /auth/refresh with valid refresh token -> Receive 200 with { accessToken }
POST /auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials

features.name: Digital Downloads (Order-bound)
features.description: Secure endpoints for retrieving download URLs for digital products, both by product and scoped to an order item; requires authentication and ownership checks.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with purchaser credentials -> Receive 200 with accessToken -> GET /orders/:id/download/:productId with Authorization Bearer token -> Receive 200 with { url: string }
GET /orders/product/:productId/download with Authorization Bearer token for a product the user owns -> Receive 200 with { url: string }
GET /orders/:id/download/:productId with Authorization Bearer token for an order not owned by the user -> Receive 403 Forbidden
GET /orders/product/:productId/download with Authorization for non-existent productId -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Testing & QA (POS waiter flows)
features.description: Unit tests and controller tests to cover POS waiter flows and OrdersService findMyOrders/download flows. Focus on controller guard/decorator behavior, guest checkout, findMyOrders behavior, and ordering of results.
user_flows: POST /auth/register with test user data -> Receive 201 -> POST /auth/login with same credentials -> Receive 200 with accessToken -> POST /orders with Authorization Bearer token and multiple items -> Receive 201 -> GET /orders/my-orders with token -> Receive 200 with Order[] ordered by createdAt desc and including items/modifiers (verify ordering and contents)
POST /orders without Authorization (guest checkout) -> Receive 201 with created Order (verify service called with undefined userId)
POST /orders with items violating modifier min/max -> Receive 400 Validation error (test ensures server rejects invalid modifier selection)
GET /orders/:id/download/:productId with token for unauthorized user -> Receive 403 Forbidden (test controller guards and ownership checks)

features.name: Orders Management (POS / Restaurant)
features.description: Create, list, and manage restaurant orders from the waiter POS. Supports DINE_IN, DELIVERY, PICKUP order types with modifier groups, server-side price calculation, stock validation, and kitchen display system (KDS) status flow.

endpoints.description: Create a new order (supports guest checkout for POS waiter flow)
List current user orders filtered by active statuses
Get download URL for a digital product by productId
Get download URL for a specific order item

features.name: Admin Orders Management (Kitchen Display)
features.description: Admin endpoints for listing all orders and updating order status through the kitchen workflow (PENDING -> PREPARING -> READY -> SERVED/DELIVERED)

endpoints.description: List all orders with optional status filter

response_schema.200: Updated Order with items and modifiers

features.name: Products Management
features.description: CRUD operations for products with variants, modifier groups, and modifiers. Supports PHYSICAL, DIGITAL, and RESTAURANT product types.

endpoints.description: Create a new product with optional variants and modifier groups

features.name: Authentication
features.description: JWT-based authentication with login, register, email verification, password reset, and token refresh

known_limitations.issue: POS createOrder in server actions (pos.ts) does not validate modifier min/max select constraints
known_limitations.impact: Orders could be created with invalid modifier selections from the frontend POS

known_limitations.issue: Order number generation uses count() which could cause collisions under high concurrency
known_limitations.impact: Duplicate order numbers possible if two orders created simultaneously

known_limitations.issue: No rate limiting on public POST /orders endpoint
